name: @nebutra/ai-primitives
description: Zero-dependency AI primitive owner for deterministic hashing, numeric math, scoped keys, and token estimates

requires: @nebutra/code-index consumes hashing and scoped key derivation
@nebutra/knowledge-graph consumes hashing, scoped key derivation, cosine, and clamp
@nebutra/knowledge-rag consumes cosine and clamp while retaining fail-loud domain errors
gaps: Only owns pure deterministic primitives; no embedding, vector-store, chunking, graph, RAG, or runtime semantics
Token estimates are intentionally heuristic and not provider tokenizer replacements
nebutra.summary: Single owner for pure AI support primitives that otherwise drift across semantic-index and agent-runtime packages
